title: Melty Gooey Uruguayan Filo Pastry Empanadas
description: A smoky and gooey Uruguayan dish featuring filo pastry and long fermentation dough, perfect for a vegan friendly meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the filo pastry and cut into squares.
In a bowl, mix together the shredded vegan mozzarella, smoked paprika, olive oil, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place a spoonful of the mozzarella mixture onto the center of each filo pastry square.
Fold the filo pastry into triangles and press the edges to seal.
Place the empanadas onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of olive oil.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the empanadas are baking, roll out the long fermentation dough and cut into strips.
After the empanadas have baked for 20 minutes, place the strips of long fermentation dough on top of the empanadas.
Return the empanadas to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the dough is golden brown.
